prompt: What is the salary for a position that is common to all hospitals?
expected: {"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "SELECT MedicalRoles.Salary  from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)"}
